sentence_analyses.grammar_notes: 怕不是 is a colloquial guess meaning 'probably/isn't she just'.

可 here means 'but/however'. 一看 means 'with one look / on looking'.

chapter_notes: This chapter mixes story dialogue with title pages, credits, shop signage, sound effects, author afterword, and promotional end-matter.
OCR is generally usable but several title/credit fragments and a few dialogue lines are visibly distorted; corrections were kept conservative and noted where important.
Colloquial variants such as 天呐, 咋, 啥, 玩意儿, 那儿, and 干吗 were preserved as intentional voice/style.
